name: Stealth Group Holdings Ltd
analysis: It is coming off a base, 28% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$1.0800. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.1400, stop A$0.7821, target A$1.3150 (0.49:1) — then trail it.
